messages.subject: Inquiry about project
messages.body: Hi, I'd like to know more about your recent project. Could you provide details?

messages.subject: Collaboration opportunity
messages.body: Hello, I'm interested in collaborating on your upcoming work. Let's discuss.

messages.subject: Feedback on demo
messages.body: The demo looks great! I have some suggestions for improvement.

messages.subject: Question about AI capabilities
messages.body: Can the AI assistant handle complex coding tasks? I'm evaluating it for our team.
messages.ai_summary: Asking about AI assistant's coding abilities.
messages.ai_response: Yes, it can handle complex coding tasks with context.

messages.subject: Suggestion for new feature
messages.body: I think adding a voice input feature would make the assistant even more useful. Just a thought!
